zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Hankyns於1535年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾代莫可時，他的父親John Hankyns10歲，母親Elyzabeth Shelley19歲。他於大約1554年與Alice Boulde在英國結婚。他去世於1569年11月25日在他的家鄉享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Hankyns于1535年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾代莫可时，他的父亲John Hankyns10岁，母亲Elyzabeth Shelley19岁。他于大约1554年与Alice Boulde在英国结婚。他去世于1569年11月25日在他的家乡享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hankyns
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hankin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Hankin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Yaron, Abbe, Isadore, Myer, Yitzhak.

English: from the Middle English personal name Hankin, a pet form of Hann , which in English usage was usually a short form of Hanry (Henry), and occasionally perhaps a rhyming pet form of Randal (Randolph). In Middle Dutch, Hankin was a pet form of Johan (John), a usage which may have been brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no examples have yet been found in Middle English where a man named John was also called Hankin. Compare Henkin , Hanks , and Hancock .
English: from Middle English Handekin, a pet form of the personal name Hand, Hond (see Hand ).

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Hankyns was born in 1535, in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England, his father, John Hankyns, was 10 and his mother, Elyzabeth Shelley, was 19. He married Alice Boulde about 1554, in England. He died on 25 November 1569, in his hometown, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Hankyns est né en 1535, à Dymock, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Hankyns, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Elyzabeth Shelley, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alice Boulde environ 1554, à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1569, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Hankyns 1535 in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hankyns 10 und seine Mutter Elyzabeth Shelley 19. Er hat um 1554 in England Alice Boulde geheiratet. Er starb am 25. November 1569 im Alter von 34 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Hankyns è nato il nel 1535 nel Dymock, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, John Hankyns, aveva 10 anni e il suo madre, Elyzabeth Shelley, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alice Boulde circa 1554, nel England. Morì il 25 novembre 1569, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Hankynsが1535年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディモックで生まれた時，父John Hankynsは10歳，母Elyzabeth Shelleyは19歳であった。約1554年にイギリスでAlice Bouldeと結婚した。彼は1569年11月25日に故郷で34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Hankyns(이)가 1535년 영국 그루스스터실르 디모c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hankyns(은)는 10세였고, 그의 어머니 Elyzabeth Shelley(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1554년 영국에서 Alice Boulde(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1569년 11월 25일 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Hankyns nasceu em 1535, em Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hankyns, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Elyzabeth Shelley, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Boulde aproximadamente 1554, em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1569, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Hankyns родился в 1535 г. в местности димокк, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Hankyns было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Elyzabeth Shelley, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Boulde около 1554 г. в местности Англия. Он умер 25 ноября 1569 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Hankyns nació en 1535, en Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hankyns, tenía 10 años y su mamá, Elyzabeth Shelley, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alice Boulde aproximadamente 1554, en Inglaterra. Murió el 25 de noviembre de 1569, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años.
